gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Erdos the 2nd approved the initial storage confinement diff with no blocking findings and noted a residual legacy-test gap. That gap was resolved by adding explicit legacy rooted relative disk path rejection coverage; the reviewer re-approved the amended diff with no findings.

poetry run ruff check . -> unavailable locally: Command not found: ruff
poetry run mypy src tests -> unavailable locally: pyenv: mypy: command not found
poetry run python -m document_kv_cache.pr_evidence --validate-directory pr-evidence --output-json /tmp/document-kv-confine-local-reader-root-all-evidence.json -> ok=true, file_count=139
GPT-5.5 reviewer approved the branch after the explicit legacy rejection coverage was added
what_changed: Routed rooted relative disk paths through the existing confined path join helper in document_kv_cache.storage.local_path.
Applied the same rooted relative disk confinement to the restaurant_kv_serving compatibility wrapper while preserving its helper hooks.
Added public and legacy regression coverage for rooted local path traversal attempts using '..', '.', and empty path components.
why: Dynamic KV shard loading from local disk should not allow manifest-provided relative paths to escape the configured shard root; this makes Disk storage match the existing DBFS and Unity Catalog path confinement behavior.
